data.body: Implemented external-test isolation. Env opt-in (REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL) autouse skip in tests/external/conftest.py; confinement hook in tests/conftest.py pytest_collection_modifyitems (auto-mark by dir + hard-fail external marker outside tests/external); --strict-markers --strict-config in pyproject addopts (all markers already registered, collects clean); separate credential+opt-in scoped external CI job with workflow_dispatch + owner==actor fork guard; meta-test tests/unit/test_external_isolation.py. Audit: zero stray live tests outside tests/external (all acli refs are mocked). Default run executes 0 external (1770 passed/7 skipped); integration 17 passed; deliberate violation fails collection; ruff clean.
